benefits.coachDesc: Get real-time feedback on pacing, clarity, and delivery to continuously improve.
benefits.storytellingDesc: Use proven frameworks to structure your message for maximum persuasion.
benefits.analysisDesc: Detailed metrics on your communication skills with actionable improvement paths.

landing.ctaDesc: Join Presencia and start speaking with intention today.

dashboard.subtitle: Track your growth as a confident communicator.
dashboard.noDataDesc: Record and analyze your first video to start tracking your communication growth. Each session adds to your skill profile.

templates.noTemplatesDesc: Try selecting a different category or browse all templates.

myVideos.subtitle: Your library of recorded video sessions.
myVideos.noVideosDesc: Create your first video to see it here. Each recording includes AI-powered analysis and feedback.

recording.title: Recording Studio
recording.ready: Your environment is ready. Start recording!
recording.analyzingDesc: Our AI is evaluating your delivery against the selected methodology. This may take a few seconds.
recording.speechNotSupported: Speech recognition not supported in this browser. Teleprompter will scroll manually.

analysis.clarityDesc: How clear and structured the message is
analysis.recommendReRecord: We recommend re-recording for better results.

createVideo.title: Create Video
createVideo.subtitle: Follow the flow to craft your high-impact message.
createVideo.chooseImpact: Choose the communication impact you want to create.
createVideo.answersShape: Answer thoughtfully. Your answers will shape the AI-generated script.
createVideo.refineDesc: Tell the AI how to improve your script. Each change updates it in real-time.
createVideo.chatPlaceholder: e.g. Make the hook more provocative...
createVideo.validateDesc: Review the final version. Once validated, you'll unlock the recording phase.

sinek.name: Sinek — Inspire
sinek.focus: Purpose-driven communication that inspires action through belief.
questions: Why do you do what you do? What is the deeper purpose behind your work or message?
How do you bring that purpose to life? What is your unique approach or process?
What is the tangible result — the product, service, or idea you are offering?
Who is your audience, and what do you want them to believe after hearing you?

obama.name: Obama — Connect
obama.focus: Emotional storytelling and personal narrative that creates deep connection.
questions: What personal experience shaped your perspective on this topic?
What challenge or turning point made this story meaningful?
What universal truth or shared value does your story reveal?
What action or reflection do you want your audience to take away?

robbins.name: Robbins — Activate
robbins.focus: High-energy persuasion that breaks limiting beliefs and drives immediate action.
questions: What limiting belief or obstacle is holding your audience back right now?
What is the transformation or breakthrough you want them to experience?
What is the first concrete step they can take right now?
What emotional state do you want them to feel — urgency, empowerment, excitement?
scriptStructure: PATTERN INTERRUPT — Break the status quo
PAIN POINT — Expose the real problem

jobs.name: Jobs — Present
jobs.focus: Structured product presentation with problem/solution clarity and theatrical reveals.
questions: What problem does your audience face that they may not fully understand yet?
What is your solution, and what makes it fundamentally different?
What is the single most impressive fact, demo, or result you can show?
How do you want the audience to remember this — what is the "one more thing"?

titles.Lesson I Learned the Hard Way: Lesson I Learned the Hard Way

descriptions.Hot Take Opener: Start with a bold, controversial statement that stops the scroll and earns the share.
descriptions.Story Hook Loop: Open with a cliffhanger that keeps viewers watching until the end.
descriptions.Before/After Reveal: Show a dramatic transformation that makes viewers want to share with others.
descriptions.3-Step Framework: Teach a simple, repeatable process your audience can apply immediately.
descriptions.Myth Buster: Debunk a common misconception in your field with clear evidence.
descriptions.Quick Tip: Share one powerful insight that changes how your audience thinks or acts.
descriptions.Problem-Agitate-Solve: Classic sales framework: surface the pain, intensify it, then present your solution.
descriptions.Social Proof Pitch: Lead with real results and testimonials to build trust before the ask.
descriptions.Value Stack: Layer multiple benefits until the offer becomes irresistible.
descriptions.Lesson I Learned the Hard Way: Share a costly mistake and the lesson that changed your business trajectory.
descriptions.Day in the Life: Give an authentic look behind the scenes of your entrepreneurial journey.
descriptions.Unpopular Opinion: Challenge conventional business wisdom with your contrarian perspective.
descriptions.Framework Breakdown: Demonstrate deep expertise by explaining a concept most people oversimplify.
descriptions.Case Study: Walk through a real result you achieved, step by step, to prove your expertise.
descriptions.Industry Prediction: Position yourself as a thought leader by sharing a bold prediction about your industry.
